# @bimfabrik/ui-theme

Vendored browser distribution of `@bimfabrik/ui-theme` 0.1.0 from
[`BIMfabrik/ui-system`](https://github.com/BIMfabrik/ui-system).

This static GitHub Pages application has no npm build step, so the package's
canonical `tokens.css` and `base.css` files are imported locally through
`index.css`.
